steps.title: Substitute the monthly payment into the formula
steps.content:
The formula is $f(x) = 24x + 1000$ where $x$ is the monthly payment. We need to find $f(300)$:

$$f(300) = 24(300) + 1000$$

steps.title: Calculate the total cost
steps.content:
Compute the product: $24 \times 300 = 7200$. This is the cost of 24 months of payments at $300 per month.

Add the fixed leasing fee: $7200 + 1000 = 8200$.

That matches choice C — C is correct.
